description: Request has no valid user session.
remediation: User must sign in before submitting or requesting access.

description: Required Storygate intake/package fields are missing.
remediation: Creator must complete all required fields.

description: Market comparables are missing from Storygate package.
remediation: Add market comparables with positioning rationale.
Creator must confirm rights before listing activation.

description: Storygate package intake depends on renderer/download output, evaluation_report_view_model_v1, uncertified Agent Readiness output, or unresolved Agent Readiness AR08/AR09 gaps as if they were certified.
remediation: Rebuild package handoff from certified agent_readiness_package_v1 or equivalent professional materials before Storygate verification.

description: Request tries to use film/screen/adaptation/producer-facing scope that is not current Storygate Studio canon.
remediation: Route back to manuscript-first publishing package only.

description: Readiness score is below canonical Storygate 9.0/10 floor or equivalent professional assessment is missing.
remediation: Creator must revise, obtain equivalent assessment, or resubmit when ready.

description: Rights gate failed or rights evidence is not certified for eligibility.
remediation: Resolve rights declaration/evidence before Storygate eligibility or listing activation.

description: Professional manuscript package is missing or incomplete.
remediation: Creator must supply a complete Storygate package.

description: Listing activation attempted for non-final manuscript.
Duplicate listing for same manuscript and creator.
remediation: Use existing listing or create governed update path.

description: Requester is not verified as a publishing professional.
remediation: Complete professional verification before browsing/requesting access.

description: Verification state lacks required audit evidence and cannot authorize controlled-access operations.
remediation: Persist verification decision with auditable evidence before allowing access requests.

description: Access request was not durably created.
remediation: Do not grant access without request record.
Restrict approval to project creator or admin.

description: Requester attempted controlled view without active grant.
Requester attempted to view/download artifact outside approved scope.
Audit event is missing governance-required structured fields.
remediation: Write validators_run, validators_failed, failure_codes, verification_state, canon_hash, and SLA timing.

description: Controlled-access checks were bypassed or grant scope was not enforced.
remediation: Invalidate current session/access path and re-enter SG10 approval + SG11 grant-scope validation.
